name: Sima Yi

skills.name: Quiet Whispers
skills.description: Gains vision of casters within a range of 2000.

skills.name: Shadow Stings
skills.description: Controls an untargetable spirit, dealing damage upon contact with enemies. The main body gains crowd control immunity. When the duration ends, using another skill or a Basic Attack will cause the main body to teleport to the spirit's location.

skills.name: Barren Lands
skills.description: Damages and silences enemies within a certain range. After a short delay, if Sima Yi is still within the skill's area, he recovers Energy. Passive: A portion of the magical damage taken is converted into Health.

skills.name: Death Descends
skills.description: After a short delay, flies to the target location, dealing damage to enemies at the destination and lower damage to enemies in his path.

tips: Sima Yi is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 46.2% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Runeblade → Boots of Tranquility → Insatiable Tome → Staves of Sorcery → Savant's Wrath → Breakthrough Robe.
Run Fate for stats that match Sima Yi's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Shadow Stings → Barren Lands → Death Descends → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Sima Yi excels into Lu Bu, Wuyan, Menki. Avoid blind picking into Alessio, Arli, Lady Zhen without team peel.

Sima Yi sits at Tier B globally (46.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Sima Yi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Sima Yi is Tier B Assassin with 46.2% win rate, 0.2% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Sima Yi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Runeblade, Boots of Tranquility, Insatiable Tome, Staves of Sorcery, Savant's Wrath, Breakthrough Robe. Run Fate arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Sima Yi?
faqs.answer: Pick Alessio, Arli, Lady Zhen into Sima Yi. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Sima Yi completes core items. Sima Yi struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Sima Yi counter?
faqs.answer: Sima Yi is strong into Lu Bu, Wuyan, Menki according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Sima Yi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Sima Yi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Sima Yi sits at Tier B globally (46.2% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Sima Yi play?
faqs.answer: Sima Yi is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin, Mage). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Sima Yi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Sima Yi or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Sima Yi vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Wukong wins 3.5% more often globally. Choose Sima Yi when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Sima Yi?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
